programs.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programs.desc: US reality series. The Jersey shore weekend continues with Bill Aydin rejecting a birthday party invite and Teresa and Louie saying goodbye to Gabriella.

programs.title: Celebrity Catchphrase
programs.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Emily Atack, Brenda Edwards, and Martin Kemp all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.

programs.title: Celebrity Wheel of Fortune
programs.desc: Graham Norton invites celebrities Tom Allen, Michelle Visage and Eddie Kadi to spin the Wheel to get the chance to play for 50,000 pounds for charity.

programs.title: The 1% Club
programs.desc: Find out how clever you are as Lee Mack presents the quiz where it doesn't matter how good you are at quizzes and where 100 contestants could win up to 100,000 pounds.

programs.title: Hell's Kitchen
programs.desc: ..: US cooking competition. Two chefs are left to battle it out in one final dinner service to prove that they are ready to lead Gordon Ramsay's kitchen.

programs.title: Family Guy
programs.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom. Brian wins a boat on a game show and decides to sail to Texas to help women seeking legal abortions, and Peter becomes a human art exhibit.
